name: the router binds a TypeScript rule to eslint and carries the tool license metadata
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/classify-rule.sh" --title 'x' --prose 'TypeScript .ts interface rule' --json > c.json 2>/dev/null; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/route-rule.sh" --in c.json --json > r.json 2>/dev/null; node -e 'const r=require(process.cwd()+"/r.json").enforced_by;const e=r.find(x=>x.tool==="eslint");if(!e||e.license!=="MIT")process.exit(1)' && echo routed-eslint-mit 1>&2
